description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The pipeline consists of two jobs: Continuous Integration (CI) and Continuous Deployment (CD). The CI job runs on an ubuntu-20.04 environment with a matrix of Python versions (2.7, 3.6-3.9), checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs tests, and uploads artifacts. The CD job deploys to PyPI and GitHub if the CI job outputs 'should_deploy' as 'true'.
